# Phase 10.0.27 Dissent Contestability Plan

Phase: 10.0.27 - Constitutional Dissent, Minority Preservation, Challenge Rights & Governance Contestability Doctrine  
Status: Planning-only handoff note. Runtime remains disabled.

## Scope

Add governance-only doctrine for constitutional dissent survivability, minority-rights continuity, governance challenge standards, legitimacy contestability, objection continuity, appeal philosophy, institutional disagreement survivability, anti-finality, anti-permanent-majority, legitimacy reevaluation, reconciliation, constitutional conflict containment, and the phase summary.

## Repository State

Repository classification remains UNSTABLE because unrelated runtime/app drift, generated Prisma artifacts, many untracked paths, and branch-ahead divergence are present. This plan does not clean, revert, stage, commit, repair, challenge, appeal, arbitrate, verify, or mutate those changes.

## Non-Runtime Constraint

This plan creates no runtime enablement, APIs, providers, adapters, credentials, OAuth, Prisma/Supabase changes, Twilio/email execution, background jobs, autonomous governance systems, automatic challenge systems, automatic appeal systems, automatic quorum systems, repository repair, staging, commits, branch repair, rollback execution, destructive git operations, deployment authority, or infrastructure activation.
